texto: You know, your first album is about really amazing things. Your first album is always about coming of age, first love, first loss, usually you suffer a first loss of someone that you love to death, even, you know, really big life lessons, things you learn from your parents' divorce or from the travels that you took.
explicacao: Citação de Brandi Carlile sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You know, your first album is about really amazing things. Your first album is always about comin…” articula sabedoria, love, vida em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como luto e viagem.
